title: Japanese Chili Crusted Chicken
description: A spicy and savory dish featuring crispy Japanese breadcrumbs and a kick of chili pepper, served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together chili powder and crispy breadcrumbs.
In a separate dish, beat eggs for egg wash.
Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
Dip each chicken breast in egg wash, then coat in chili-breadcrumb mixture.
Place coated chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and sprinkle with bake seasoning (if using).
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve with steamed broccoli and drizzle with soy sauce (if using).
Optional: serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a simple salad.
